source.title: Rejected Take Off Distance OEI Clear Area
source.rfm_source: Leonardo AW139 Rotorcraft Flight Manual (RFM), Ed. 2, Rev. 32

notes: This package is vector-first. Grid and linework were extracted from the PDF content stream, not from raster image detection.
This is still geometric extraction only. No calculation or interpolation is implemented yet.
The center panel contains three main weight curves. Semantic labeling of each weight family will be finalized in the next audit pass.
